creator: jpf@wave-star.com
text:
mogrify -format jpg something.tif
does not deliver a something.jpg file.
It appears that the temporary file it generates in /var/tmp is not being copied back to the current directory.

The same is true for convert.

Is there a quickie fix?
Thanks,
--jpf.

BTW:
This problem has been confirmed on multiple 4.3-stable FreeBSD boxes.

How-To-Repeat: Take a peek at /var/tmp and you will see all the files mogrify and friends are leaving behind.
